name: ai-humanizer
description: Detector-guided humanizer skill that lowers the AI-detection score of English text while preserving every key term, number, citation, and the original logic.

plugins.name: ai-humanizer
plugins.description: Lower the AI-detection score of English text without changing what it says. Keyless ZeroGPT baseline, the running agent as the rewriter, verbatim term preservation, before/after diff, and Turnitin/GPTZero PDF report reading.
